pages.text: Around the end you've probably come across some voidite ore, mining it with a diamond pickaxe or higher you get the raw ore. On it's own it can't be used for much

After smelting the raw voidite you're left with the ingot which needs further processing to be useful. In a $(l:blocks/celestalee_furnace)Celestalee Furnace/$ you can make $(item)Annealed voidite ingots/$

After heating the normal ingot you get this, still not what you need but a step closer. Now you have to find the resources to make the $(l:blocks/hammer_of_the_end)DHADE/$ where you can continue working this metal
After pressing the annealed ingots you get these plates which needs to be heated once more in the $(l:blocks/celestalee_furnace)Celestalee Furnace/$ to make it more malleable
After all that work you've hopefully explored a big piece of the end and have enough to finally make some armor and tools
